features.subtitle: Every feature is designed to reduce administrative burden and enhance the learning experience.

aiGeneration.title: Automatic exam generation
aiGeneration.description: Let AI build balanced, non-repetitive exams based on curriculum weights and difficulty criteria.

questionBank.title: Question bank creation
questionBank.description: Organize academic assets with smart tags — import and manage thousands of questions across departments with ease.

integrity.title: Academic integrity suite
integrity.description: Advanced proctoring, random question shuffling, and dynamic display to ensure the highest exam security standards.

analytics.title: Student analytics
analytics.description: Dive into performance metrics with psychometric analysis and cohort progress tracking.
